note: Iframe defines one field type with three widgets and four formatters plus per-field styling settings and a themeable template. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded): they probe documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I want to embed a complete iframe (source URL plus width/height/title) into a content type without writing HTML. Which contrib module and field type do I use, and what is the field type's machine id?
evals.expected_output: The Iframe module provides a field type with machine id `iframe`; add it via Field UI and it stores a URL plus title, width, height and styling attributes.

evals.prompt: The Iframe field offers three widgets that control how much of the size the editor can set. Name the three widget ids and what each shows.
evals.expected_output: iframe_url (URL only), iframe_urlheight (URL + height), iframe_urlwidthheight (URL + width + height, the default).

evals.prompt: I want to render an iframe field either as an embedded iframe or as a plain link. Which formatters does the Iframe module provide?
evals.expected_output: iframe_default (title over iframe), iframe_only (iframe without title), iframe_asurl (link with the title), iframe_asurlwithuri (link with the URI as title).

evals.prompt: What formats can I enter for the width and height of an Iframe field, and how do I make the iframe responsive?
evals.expected_output: Plain number = pixels (e.g. 500), number + % = percent (50%), plus em/rem/vw for width and em/rem/vh for height; add the iframe-responsive class to use width/height as an aspect ratio.

evals.prompt: Which Iframe field setting controls whether the embedded iframe (e.g. a video player) is allowed to go fullscreen, and what is its default?
evals.expected_output: The allowfullscreen setting (0 = false, 1 = true) toggles the iframe's allowfullscreen attribute; the widget default is 1 (true).

evals.prompt: How do I control scrollbars on an Iframe field's embed, and what are the allowed values and default?
evals.expected_output: The scrolling setting accepts auto (Automatic), no (Disabled), or yes (Enabled); default is auto.

evals.prompt: By default editors cannot set a custom CSS class on an Iframe field. Which widget setting lets an author specify an additional CSS class per iframe?
evals.expected_output: Enable the expose_class widget setting ("Expose Additional CSS Class") so the class field is shown to authors; otherwise the field's class is applied automatically.

evals.prompt: The Iframe module renders the title as a heading above the embed. Which template and variable control the heading level for accessibility, and what is the default?
evals.expected_output: templates/iframe.html.twig renders the title using the headerlevel variable (h1–h4), defaulting to h3.
